# Application Payload Reference

Both endpoints (`/api/apply/new` and `/api/apply/renewal`) accept a JSON body
with this structure. Required fields are marked with *.

---

## New Loan — POST /api/apply/new

```json
{
  "ref":         "WF-123456",        // generated by frontend
  "submittedAt": "2026-04-01T...",   // ISO timestamp
  "type":        "new",

  "personal": {
    "firstName":  "Marie",           // *
    "lastName":   "Tremblay",
    "email":      "marie@test.ca",   // *
    "dob":        "1990-04-15",
    "homePhone":  "(514) 555-0100",
    "cellPhone":  "(514) 555-0123",
    "sex":        "female",
    "province":   "QC",              // *
    "address":    "123 Rue Principale",
    "city":       "Montreal",
    "postal":     "H2X 1A1",
    "declaredIncome": 2400           // monthly net — used for mismatch signal
  },

  "employment": {
    "source":       "employed",
    "employer":     "Acme Corp",
    "payFrequency": "biweekly",      // * weekly | biweekly | monthly
    "nextPay":      "2026-04-18",    // *
    "paidBy":       "direct"
  },

  "loan": {
    "amount":     300,               // * 100–1000
    "fundMethod": "direct"           // direct | instant | etransfer
  },

  "banking": {
    "flinksLoginId": "sandbox-green-abc123",  // *
    "institution":   "RBC Royal Bank",
    "sandbox":       true
  },

  "signature": {
    "fullName":  "Marie Tremblay",
    "timestamp": "2026-04-01T12:00:00Z"
  },

  "safetyContact": {
    "firstName":    "Jean",
    "lastName":     "Martin",
    "phone":        "(514) 555-0199",
    "relationship": "spouse"
  }
}
```

---

## Response

```json
{
  "ref":      "WF-123456",
  "decision": "auto_approved",     // auto_approved | manual_review | auto_declined
  "tier":     "gold",
  "score":    4,
  "approvedAmount": 300,
  "message":  "Your application has been approved!",
  "nextSteps": [...]
}
```

---

## Sandbox Flinks Login IDs

Prefix the loginId with a tier name to simulate that scenario:

| loginId prefix | Simulated scenario |
|---|---|
| `sandbox-gold-` | Auto-approved, score 4 |
| `sandbox-green-` | Manual review, score 22 |
| `sandbox-blue-` | Manual review, score 38 |
| `sandbox-yellow-` | Manual review, score 58 |
| `sandbox-orange-` | Manual review + feasible amount, score 78 |
| `sandbox-red-` | Auto-declined, score 95 |
